trajectory_summary: This call never started. The dialed number routed to voicemail at 00:00 and the transcript ends at 00:13 with no rep speech, no customer speech, and no interaction of any kind. There is no trajectory to read — no energy built, no energy leaked, no state changes, no coaching moments grounded in human exchange.
outcome_dispute: The v1 outcome tag is listed as 'unknown,' which is accurate. The correct classification is 'no contact — voicemail reached.' No appointment was booked, no qualification occurred, no conversation happened. If this call is tagged as anything other than a dead-dial/voicemail, that tag should be corrected in the CRM.

primary_coaching_focus.topic: Dead-dial protocol — voicemail handling and re-contact discipline
primary_coaching_focus.quote: At the tone, please record your message. When you've finished recording, you may hang up, or press 1 for more options.
primary_coaching_focus.why: This transcript contains no rep behavior to coach on. The only actionable coaching question is whether the rep has a consistent dead-dial protocol: leave a scripted voicemail, log the attempt, re-queue for callback. Under the stair-step comp model, dead-dials that aren't re-contacted are direct income misses. The manager should use this call as a prompt to audit the rep's dead-dial habits across the pay period, not as a standalone coaching moment.

key_moments.quote: Your call has been forwarded to an automated voice messaging system.
key_moments.stewart_read: The call never connected to a live customer. The entire transcript is the voicemail system's automated greeting. There is no rep action, no customer state, and no interaction to evaluate. This is a dead-dial record.

The voicemail system reads back the dialed number. This is the only 'data' in the transcript. It confirms the number was live enough to route to voicemail but not answered. No inference about customer intent, qualification, or interest is possible from this.

The voicemail system confirms the number is not available. This is a no-contact outcome. Under Ion's compensation model, setters are paid on sits — a dead-dial produces zero value. The only question is whether the rep has a documented re-contact strategy.

key_moments.quote: At the tone, please record your message. When you've finished recording, you may hang up, or press 1 for more options.
key_moments.stewart_read: The transcript ends here. No voicemail was recorded in the transcript, no rep speech appears anywhere. Either the rep hung up without leaving a message, or the recording ended before capturing any rep action. Either way, there is no coaching content in this call record.
